title: Fixer (disambiguation)
content:
'''Fixer''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[The Fixer]]''', a criminal who traveled aboard the [[MPO-1400 Purgill-class star cruiser|MPO-1400 ''Purgill''-class starcruiser]] ''[[Halcyon]]''
*'''[[Laze Loneozner|Laze "Fixer" Loneozner]]''', a childhood friend of [[Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Fixer (clone commando)|'''Fixer''']], a [[clone commando]] designated RC-1140
*'''[[Fixer (mouse droid)]]''', a [[MSE-6 series repair droid]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Fixer (clone trooper)|Fixer]]''', a [[Clone cold assault trooper/Legends|Clone cold assault trooper]]
*'''[[Fixer (Imperial Intelligence)|Fixer]]''', a rank in the [[Imperial Intelligence (Sith Empire)|Imperial Intelligence]] of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]].
**'''[[Fixer Two]]'''
**'''[[Fixer Seven]]'''
**'''[[Fixer Twelve]]'''
**'''[[Fixer Fourteen]]'''
**'''[[Eckard Lokin|Fixer Fifteen]]'''
**'''[[Fixer 41]]'''
**'''[[Fixer 66]]'''
**'''[[Fixer 88]]'''
**'''[[Fixer 103]]'''
**'''[[Fixer 308]]'''
*'''''[[Fixer (Maintenance Carrier)|Fixer]]''''', an Imperial maintenance carrier
*'''[[Laze Loneozner/Legends|Laze "Fixer" Loneozner]]''', a childhood friend of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*'''[[Noonian Fixer]]''', an alcoholic beverage
*'''[[RC-1140/Legends|RC-1140]]''', a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] nicknamed "'''Fixer'''"
==Non-canon==
*[[Fixer (Dowutin)|'''Fixer''']], a [[Dowutin]]
*[[Fixer (mouse droid)/LEGO|'''Fixer''']], a [[MSE-6 series repair droid]]
